_publications._publicationTitle: Survival of Human Neurofibroma in Immunodeficient Mice and Initial Results of Therapy With Pirfenidone

_contextSnippet: Subcutaneously implanted tumors had similar survival rates (77/91) as tumors implanted into epineurium of the sciatic nerve (13/15)
details: Subcutaneous implants had 77/91 survival rate, epineurium implants had 13/15 survival rate
